allow: Bash(awk '/test result/{p+=$4; f+=$6} END {print "TOTAL PASSED:", p, "  FAILED:", f}')
Bash(awk '{p+=$4; f+=$6} END {print "TOTAL PASSED:", p, "  FAILED:", f}')

Bash(awk '-F[:;]' '{ for \(i=1; i<=NF; i++\) { if \($i ~ /passed/\) { gsub\("[^0-9]","",$i\); p += $i } if \($i ~ /failed/\) { gsub\("[^0-9]","",$i\); f += $i } } } END { print "after step 1:", p, "passed,", f, "failed" }')

Bash(awk '-F[:;]' '{ for \(i=1; i<=NF; i++\) { if \($i ~ /passed/\) { gsub\("[^0-9]","",$i\); p += $i } if \($i ~ /failed/\) { gsub\("[^0-9]","",$i\); f += $i } } } END { print "stage34:", p, "passed,", f, "failed" }')
